2026-04-22T00:29:13.0892748Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-22T00:29:13.0893679Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-22T00:29:13.0894088Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-22T00:29:13.0894434Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-22T00:29:13.0894731Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-22T00:29:13.0894977Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-22T00:29:13.0895133Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-22T00:29:13.0895314Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-22T00:29:13.0895485Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-22T00:29:13.0895708Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-22T00:29:13.0895899Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-22T00:29:13.0896171Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-22T00:29:13.0896423Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

This is distinct from noop (no action needed) — it indicates an active failure that prevented the task from running. The workflow framework will treat this as a failure signal even when the agent exits successfully.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"details":{"description":"Optional extended details or diagnostic context about the failure (max 65000 characters).","type":"string"},"reason":{"description":"A concise explanation of why the task could not be completed (max 1024 characters). Be specific about which tools or resources were unavailable.","type":"string"}},"required":["reason"],"type":"object"},"name":"report_incomplete"},{"description":"Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"message":{"description":"The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols","type":"string"},"owners":{"description":"Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')","type":"string"}},"required":["message","owners"],"type":"object"},"name":"mention_owners"}]}}}

Use the endCursor from the previous page's PageInfo for GraphQL APIs.","type":"string"},"direction":{"description":"Order direction. If provided, the 'direction' also needs to be provided.","enum":["CREATED_AT","UPDATED_AT","COMMENTS"],"type":"string"},"owner":{"description":"Repository owner","type":"string"},"perPage":{"description":"Results per page for pagination (min 1, max 100)","maximum":100,"minimum":1,"type":"number"},"repo":{"description":"Repository name","type":"string"},"since":{"description":"Filter by date (ISO 8601 timestamp)","type":"string"},"state":{"description":"Filter by state, by default both open and closed issues are returned when not provided","enum":["OPEN","CLOSED"],"type":"string"}},"required":["owner","repo"],"type":"object"},"name":"list_issues"},{"annotations":{"readOnlyHint":true,"title":"Search issues"},"description":"Search for issues in GitHub repositories using issues search syntax already scoped to is:issue","icons":[{"mimeType":"image/png","src":"data:image/png;base64,","theme":"light"},{"mimeType":"image/png","src":"data:image/png;base64,","theme":"dark"}],"inputSchema":{"properties":{"order":{"description":"Sort order","enum":["asc","desc"],"type":"string"},"owner":{"description":"Optional repository owner. 2026-04-22T00:31:48.5967332Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-22T00:30:04.441407152Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58467,\"title\":\"[StorageMover] Docs: Add service-specific examples and document v1.4.0 new features\",\"body\":\"## Documentation Gap\\n\\n**Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.StorageMover`\\n**Service directory:** `sdk/storagemover/Azure.ResourceManager.StorageMover/`\\n**Triggered by:** commit b8b94c350 (PR #57153) by `@azure-sdk`\\n\\n## What Changed\\n\\nA new version (1.4.0) of the StorageMover management library was introduced, upgrading to API version 2025-12-01. The release adds significant new capabilities:\\n\\n- S3 with HMAC authentication endpoints (`S3WithHmacEndpointProperties`)\\n- Azure Multi-Cloud Connector endpoints (`AzureMultiCloudConnectorEndpointProperties`)\\n- Azure Storage NFS File Share endpoints (`AzureStorageNfsFileShareEndpointProperties`)\\n- Job definition scheduling support (`StorageMoverScheduleInfo`, `StorageMoverScheduleFrequency`)\\n- Data integrity validation for job definitions (`StorageMoverDataIntegrityValidation`)\\n- New properties: `IsPermissionsPreserved`, `StorageMoverJobTriggerType`, `ScheduledExecutionOn`, `StorageMoverEndpointKind`, `Connections`\\n\\n## Gaps Found\\n\\n- **Examples section is empty of real code**: The README currently links only to a generic `aka.ms/azuresdk-net-mgmt-samples` URL — no inline code snippets demonstrate creating or using any StorageMover resource\\n- **Key concepts section lacks service-specific content**: The section points to generic Azure SDK design principles but does not explain StorageMover-specific concepts (Storage Movers, Projects, Agents, Endpoints, Job Definitions, Job Runs, and their relationships)\\n- **New v1.4.0 features are not documented in the README**: S3/HMAC endpoints, Multi-Cloud Connector endpoints, NFS File Share endpoints, job scheduling, and data integrity validation have no corresponding examples or explanation in the README\\n- **No custom `tests/Samples/` files with `#region Snippet:` blocks**: Only auto-generated samples exist; there are no hand-crafted samples that walk through common scenarios to be pulled into README via `Update-Snippets.ps1`\\n- **Troubleshooting section lacks service-specific guidance**: No mention of common issues specific to StorageMover (e.g., agent connectivity, endpoint misconfiguration, job failures)\\n\\n\\n\\u003cstrong\\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\\u003c/strong\\u003e\\n\\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\\n\\n### Step 1: Modify files\\n\\n**Edit** `sdk/storagemover/Azure.ResourceManager.StorageMover/README.md`:\\n\\n1. Replace the generic `## Key concepts` section with service-specific content:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Key concepts\\n\\nThe Azure Storage Mover SDK is organized around these core resources:\\n\\n- **StorageMover** (`StorageMoverResource`): The top-level resource representing a storage mover deployment in a resource group.\\n- **Agent** (`StorageMoverAgentResource`): A registered hybrid compute resource that performs the actual data transfer.\\n- **Endpoint** (`StorageMoverEndpointResource`): Represents a source or destination for migration jobs. Supported types include:\\n  - `AzureStorageBlobContainerEndpointProperties` — Azure Blob Storage container\\n  - `AzureStorageSmbFileShareEndpointProperties` — Azure Files SMB share\\n  - `AzureStorageNfsFileShareEndpointProperties` — Azure Files NFS share (new in 1.4.0)\\n  - `NfsMountEndpointProperties` — on-premises NFS mount\\n  - `SmbMountEndpointProperties` — on-premises SMB share\\n  - `S3WithHmacEndpointProperties` — S3-compatible storage with HMAC authentication (new in 1.4.0)\\n  - `AzureMultiCloudConnectorEndpointProperties` — Multi-Cloud Connector endpoint (new in 1.4.0)\\n- **Project** (`StorageMoverProjectResource`): A logical grouping of related job definitions.\\n- **Job Definition** (`JobDefinitionResource`): Defines a migration task including source endpoint, target endpoint, associated agent, scheduling, and data integrity settings.\\n- **Job Run** (`JobRunResource`): An individual execution instance of a job definition.\\n```\\n\\n2. Replace the generic `## Examples` section with snippet placeholders:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Examples\\n\\n### Create a Storage Mover\\n\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### Create an Azure Blob Container endpoint\\n\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### Create a job definition with scheduling\\n\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### Start a job run\\n\\n```\\n```\\n```\\n\\n3. Expand the `## Troubleshooting` section:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Troubleshooting\\n\\n- **Agent not registering**: Ensure the hybrid compute machine running the agent has outbound connectivity to Azure and that the `ARC_Resource_Bridge` VM extension is installed correctly.\\n- **Job run stuck in `Queued` state**: Verify the agent assigned to the job definition has a `Connected` status (`StorageMoverAgentStatus.Online`).\\n- **Endpoint validation errors**: Check that the storage account firewall rules allow access from the agent\\u0026#39;s IP, and that the correct credentials/connection string are provided for the endpoint type.\\n- **S3 HMAC auth failures (new in 1.4.0)**: Ensure the `AccessKeyId` and `SecretAccessKey` properties are correctly set on `S3WithHmacEndpointProperties`.\\n- File an issue via [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues).\\n- Check [previous questions]((stackoverflow.com/redacted) or ask new ones on Stack Overflow using the `azure` and `.net` tags.\\n```\\n\\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\\n\\n**Create** `sdk/storagemover/Azure.ResourceManager.StorageMover/tests/Samples/Sample1_StorageMoverBasics.cs`:\\n\\n```csharp\\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\\n\\nusing System;\\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\\nusing Azure.Identity;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Resources;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.StorageMover;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.StorageMover.Models;\\nusing NUnit.Framework;\\n\\nnamespace Azure.ResourceManager.StorageMover.Samples\\n{\\n    public class Sample1_StorageMoverBasics\\n    {\\n        [Test]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Only run in live tests\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task CreateStorageMover()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:StorageMover_CreateOrUpdate\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription.GetResourceGroups().GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myResourceGroup\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            StorageMoverCollection storageMoverCollection = resourceGroup.GetStorageMovers();\\n            StorageMoverData data = new StorageMoverData(new Azure.Core.AzureLocation(\\u0026#34;eastus\\u0026#34;));\\n            ArmOperation lro = await storageMoverCollection.CreateOrUpdateAsync(\\n                WaitUntil.Completed,\\n                \\u0026#34;myStorageMover\\u0026#34;,\\n                data);\\n            StorageMoverResource storageMover = lro.Value;\\n            Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Created StorageMover: {storageMover.Data.Name}\\u0026#34;);\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Only run in live tests\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task CreateBlobEndpoint()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:StorageMover_CreateBlobEndpoint\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription.GetResourceGroups().GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myResourceGroup\\u0026#34;);\\n            StorageMoverResource storageMover = await resourceGroup.GetStorageMovers().GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myStorageMover\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            StorageMoverEndpointCollection endpointCollection = storageMover.GetStorageMoverEndpoints();\\n            StorageMoverEndpointData endpointData = new StorageMoverEndpointData(\\n                new AzureStorageBlobContainerEndpointProperties(\\n                    storageAccountResourceId: new Azure.Core.ResourceIdentifier(\\u0026#34;/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/myRG/providers/Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/myStorageAccount\\u0026#34;),\\n                    blobContainerName: \\u0026#34;mycontainer\\u0026#34;));\\n\\n            ArmOperation lro = await endpointCollection.CreateOrUpdateAsync(\\n                WaitUntil.Completed,\\n                \\u0026#34;myBlobEndpoint\\u0026#34;,\\n                endpointData);\\n            StorageMoverEndpointResource endpoint = lro.Value;\\n            Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Created endpoint: {endpoint.Data.Name}\\u0026#34;);\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Only run in live tests\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task CreateJobDefinitionWithSchedule()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:StorageMover_CreateJobDefinitionWithSchedule\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription.GetResourceGroups().GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myResourceGroup\\u0026#34;);\\n            StorageMoverResource storageMover = await resourceGroup.GetStorageMovers().GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myStorageMover\\u0026#34;);\\n            StorageMoverProjectResource project = await storageMover.GetStorageMoverProjects().GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myProject\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            JobDefinitionData jobDefData = new JobDefinitionData(\\n                copyMode: StorageMoverCopyMode.Additive)\\n            {\\n                SourceName = \\u0026#34;myNfsEndpoint\\u0026#34;,\\n                TargetName = \\u0026#34;myBlobEndpoint\\u0026#34;,\\n                AgentName = \\u0026#34;myAgent\\u0026#34;,\\n                // New in 1.4.0: configure a recurring schedule\\n                Schedule = new StorageMoverScheduleInfo\\n                {\\n                    Frequency = StorageMoverScheduleFrequency.Daily,\\n                    // ScheduleTime = ...\\n                },\\n                // New in 1.4.0: enable data integrity validation\\n                DataIntegrityValidation = StorageMoverDataIntegrityValidation.Enabled,\\n                // New in 1.4.0: preserve permissions\\n                IsPermissionsPreserved = true,\\n            };\\n\\n            ArmOperation lro = await project.GetJobDefinitions().CreateOrUpdateAsync(\\n                WaitUntil.Completed,\\n                \\u0026#34;myJobDefinition\\u0026#34;,\\n                jobDefData);\\n            JobDefinitionResource jobDefinition = lro.Value;\\n            Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Created job definition: {jobDefinition.Data.Name}\\u0026#34;);\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Only run in live tests\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task StartJobRun()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:StorageMover_StartJobRun\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription.GetResourceGroups().GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myResourceGroup\\u0026#34;);\\n            StorageMoverResource storageMover = await resourceGroup.GetStorageMovers().GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myStorageMover\\u0026#34;);\\n            StorageMoverProjectResource project = await storageMover.GetStorageMoverProjects().GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myProject\\u0026#34;);\\n            JobDefinitionResource jobDefinition = await project.GetJobDefinitions().GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myJobDefinition\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            // Start a new job run\\n            ArmOperation startLro = await jobDefinition.StartJobAsync(WaitUntil.Started);\\n\\n            // List all runs for this job definition\\n            await foreach (JobRunResource run in jobDefinition.GetJobRuns().GetAllAsync())\\n            {\\n                Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Job run {run.Data.Name}: status={run.Data.Status}\\u0026#34;);\\n            }\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\n```\\n\\nEach `#region Snippet:` tag corresponds to the `C# Snippet:` placeholder inserted in the README in Step 1.\\n\\n### Step 3: Verify README Replace the generic `## Key concepts` section with service-specific content:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Key concepts\\n\\nThe Azure Storage Mover SDK is organized around these core resources:\\n\\n- **StorageMover** (`StorageMoverResource`): The top-level resource representing a storage mover deployment in a resource group.\\n- **Agent** (`StorageMoverAgentResource`): A registered hybrid compute resource that performs the actual data transfer.\\n- **Endpoint** (`StorageMoverEndpointResource`): Represents a source or destination for migration jobs. Supported types include:\\n  - `AzureStorageBlobContainerEndpointProperties` — Azure Blob Storage container\\n  - `AzureStorageSmbFileShareEndpointProperties` — Azure Files SMB share\\n  - `AzureStorageNfsFileShareEndpointProperties` — Azure Files NFS share (new in 1.4.0)\\n  - `NfsMountEndpointProperties` — on-premises NFS mount\\n  - `SmbMountEndpointProperties` — on-premises SMB share\\n  - `S3WithHmacEndpointProperties` — S3-compatible storage with HMAC authentication (new in 1.4.0)\\n  - `AzureMultiCloudConnectorEndpointProperties` — Multi-Cloud Connector endpoint (new in 1.4.0)\\n- **Project** (`StorageMoverProjectResource`): A logical grouping of related job definitions.\\n- **Job Definition** (`JobDefinitionResource`): Defines a migration task including source endpoint, target endpoint, associated agent, scheduling, and data integrity settings.\\n- **Job Run** (`JobRunResource`): An individual execution instance of a job definition.\\n```\\n\\n2. Replace the generic `## Examples` section with snippet placeholders:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Examples\\n\\n### Create a Storage Mover\\n\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### Create an Azure Blob Container endpoint\\n\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### Create a job definition with scheduling\\n\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### Start a job run\\n\\n```\\n```\\n```\\n\\n3. Expand the `## Troubleshooting` section:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Troubleshooting\\n\\n- **Agent not registering**: Ensure the hybrid compute machine running the agent has outbound connectivity to Azure and that the `ARC_Resource_Bridge` VM extension is installed correctly.\\n- **Job run stuck in `Queued` state**: Verify the agent assigned to the job definition has a `Connected` status (`StorageMoverAgentStatus.Online`).\\n- **Endpoint validation errors**: Check that the storage account firewall rules allow access from the agent\\u0026#39;s IP, and that the correct credentials/connection string are provided for the endpoint type.\\n- **S3 HMAC auth failures (new in 1.4.0)**: Ensure the `AccessKeyId` and `SecretAccessKey` properties are correctly set on `S3WithHmacEndpointProperties`.\\n- File an issue via [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues).\\n- Check [previous questions]((stackoverflow.com/redacted) or ask new ones on Stack Overflow using the `azure` and `.net` tags.\\n```\\n\\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\\n\\n**Create** `sdk/storagemover/Azure.ResourceManager.StorageMover/tests/Samples/Sample1_StorageMoverBasics.cs`:\\n\\n```csharp\\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\\n\\nusing System;\\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\\nusing Azure.Identity;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Resources;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.StorageMover;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.StorageMover.Models;\\nusing NUnit.Framework;\\n\\nnamespace Azure.ResourceManager.StorageMover.Samples\\n{\\n    public class Sample1_StorageMoverBasics\\n    {\\n        [Test]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Only run in live tests\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task CreateStorageMover()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:StorageMover_CreateOrUpdate\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription.GetResourceGroups().GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myResourceGroup\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            StorageMoverCollection storageMoverCollection = resourceGroup.GetStorageMovers();\\n            StorageMoverData data = new StorageMoverData(new Azure.Core.AzureLocation(\\u0026#34;eastus\\u0026#34;));\\n            ArmOperation lro = await storageMoverCollection.CreateOrUpdateAsync(\\n                WaitUntil.Completed,\\n                \\u0026#34;myStorageMover\\u0026#34;,\\n                data);\\n            StorageMoverResource storageMover = lro.Value;\\n            Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Created StorageMover: {storageMover.Data.Name}\\u0026#34;);\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Only run in live tests\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task CreateBlobEndpoint()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:StorageMover_CreateBlobEndpoint\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription.GetResourceGroups().GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myResourceGroup\\u0026#34;);\\n            StorageMoverResource storageMover = await resourceGroup.GetStorageMovers().GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myStorageMover\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            StorageMoverEndpointCollection endpointCollection = storageMover.GetStorageMoverEndpoints();\\n            StorageMoverEndpointData endpointData = new StorageMoverEndpointData(\\n                new AzureStorageBlobContainerEndpointProperties(\\n                    storageAccountResourceId: new Azure.Core.ResourceIdentifier(\\u0026#34;/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/myRG/providers/Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/myStorageAccount\\u0026#34;),\\n                    blobContainerName: \\u0026#34;mycontainer\\u0026#34;));\\n\\n            ArmOperation lro = await endpointCollection.CreateOrUpdateAsync(\\n                WaitUntil.Completed,\\n                \\u0026#34;myBlobEndpoint\\u0026#34;,\\n                endpointData);\\n            StorageMoverEndpointResource endpoint = lro.Value;\\n            Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Created endpoint: {endpoint.Data.Name}\\u0026#34;);\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Only run in live tests\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task CreateJobDefinitionWithSchedule()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:StorageMover_CreateJobDefinitionWithSchedule\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription.GetResourceGroups().GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myResourceGroup\\u0026#34;);\\n            StorageMoverResource storageMover = await resourceGroup.GetStorageMovers().GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myStorageMover\\u0026#34;);\\n            StorageMoverProjectResource project = await storageMover.GetStorageMoverProjects().GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myProject\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            JobDefinitionData jobDefData = new JobDefinitionData(\\n                copyMode: StorageMoverCopyMode.Additive)\\n            {\\n                SourceName = \\u0026#34;myNfsEndpoint\\u0026#34;,\\n                TargetName = \\u0026#34;myBlobEndpoint\\u0026#34;,\\n                AgentName = \\u0026#34;myAgent\\u0026#34;,\\n                // New in 1.4.0: configure a recurring schedule\\n                Schedule = new StorageMoverScheduleInfo\\n                {\\n                    Frequency = StorageMoverScheduleFrequency.Daily,\\n                    // ScheduleTime = ...\\n                },\\n                // New in 1.4.0: enable data integrity validation\\n                DataIntegrityValidation = StorageMoverDataIntegrityValidation.Enabled,\\n                // New in 1.4.0: preserve permissions\\n                IsPermissionsPreserved = true,\\n            };\\n\\n            ArmOperation lro = await project.GetJobDefinitions().CreateOrUpdateAsync(\\n                WaitUntil.Completed,\\n                \\u0026#34;myJobDefinition\\u0026#34;,\\n                jobDefData);\\n            JobDefinitionResource jobDefinition = lro.Value;\\n            Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Created job definition: {jobDefinition.Data.Name}\\u0026#34;);\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Only run in live tests\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task StartJobRun()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:StorageMover_StartJobRun\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\n            ResourceGroupResource resourceGroup = await subscription.GetResourceGroups().GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myResourceGroup\\u0026#34;);\\n            StorageMoverResource storageMover = await resourceGroup.GetStorageMovers().GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myStorageMover\\u0026#34;);\\n            StorageMoverProjectResource project = await storageMover.GetStorageMoverProjects().GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myProject\\u0026#34;);\\n            JobDefinitionResource jobDefinition = await project.GetJobDefinitions().GetAsync(\\u0026#34;myJobDefinition\\u0026#34;);\\n\\n            // Start a new job run\\n            ArmOperation startLro = await jobDefinition.StartJobAsync(WaitUntil.Started);\\n\\n            // List all runs for this job definition\\n            await foreach (JobRunResource run in jobDefinition.GetJobRuns().GetAllAsync())\\n            {\\n                Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Job run {run.Data.Name}: status={run.Data.Status}\\u0026#34;);\\n            }\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\n```\\n\\nEach `#region Snippet:` tag corresponds to the `C# Snippet:` placeholder inserted in the README in Step 1.\\n\\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\\n\\nThe README at `sdk/storagemover/Azure.ResourceManager.StorageMover/README.md` currently contains the required top-level sections, but these need improvement:\\n\\n| Section | Status | Action |\\n|---|---|---|\\n| Getting started → Install the package | ✅ Present | No change needed |\\n| Getting started → Prerequisites | ✅ Present | No change needed |\\n| Getting started → Authenticate the client | ✅ Present | No change needed |\\n| Key concepts | ⚠️ Generic only | Replace with service-specific content (Step 1) |\\n| Examples | ❌ No code examples | Add snippet placeholders (Step 1) |\\n| Troubleshooting | ⚠️ Generic only | Expand with service-specific guidance (Step 1) |\\n| Next steps | ✅ Present | No change needed |\\n| Contributing | ✅ Present | No change needed |\\n\\n### Step 4: Validate\\n\\nRun these commands in order:\\n\\n1. `dotnet build sdk/storagemover/Azure.ResourceManager.StorageMover/`\\n2. `dotnet test sdk/storagemover/Azure.ResourceManager.StorageMover/ --filter TestCategory!=Live`\\n3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 storagemover` — injects the `#region Snippet:` blocks from the new sample test file into README placeholders. Verify the README diff shows code was injected.\\n4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 storagemover` — no new public API is expected, but run to confirm no drift\\n5. `dotnet format sdk/storagemover/Azure.ResourceManager.StorageMover/`\\n\\n\\n\\n## Next Steps\\n\\n\\u0026gt;
